mapper.select: SELECT u.*, r.role_name FROM users u JOIN user_roles r ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE u.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{displayName}, email = #{email} WHERE id = #{id}
